commentaries.author: Aponius
commentaries.content: I say that these [lambs] are the souls of those who are truly made heavenly philosophers, rejecting the world with its delights and false show and who prefer to dwell in the desert rather than in royal palaces. - "Exposition of Song of Songs 2.3"

commentaries.author: Clement Of Alexandria
commentaries.content: He calls us lambs, the Spirit by the mouth of Isaiah is an unimpeachable witness, using the figurative appellation of lambs, which are still more tender than sheep, to express simplicity.

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: Young, or have lately had young lambs, foetas. Jesus is the good shepherd, John x. 14.
